items.title: Cross-identity sliding refresh is dropped (the clobber fix)
steps: 1. Set localStorage auth_token to a token for user 76 (dave)
2. Call storeRefreshedToken with an x-session-refresh token for user 72 (info)
items.expected: localStorage still holds user 76's token — a different-identity refresh is never persisted
items.evidence: frontend/src/api/index.test.ts: 'drops a different-identity refresh (no clobber)', 'drops a refresh when no session is present', pilot-mode drop variant — vitest 6/6
items.notes: This is the direct fix for the dave -> info clobber.

items.title: Same-identity sliding refresh still persists (no forced logout)
steps: 1. Set localStorage auth_token to an older token for user 76
2. Call storeRefreshedToken with a newer x-session-refresh token for user 76
items.expected: localStorage is updated to the newer same-user token — sliding expiry is preserved
items.evidence: frontend/src/api/index.test.ts: 'persists a same-identity refresh (extends the session)', pilot-mode same-identity write

items.title: JWT decode helper reads userId and fails safe
steps: 1. Run frontend unit tests for decodeJwtUserId
items.expected: userId / id / user_id decoded to a number; malformed or empty token -> null

items.title: End-to-end: signing in as a 2nd @getalloro account over a stale session lands as that account
items.precondition: Deployed to dev; a stale admin session already in the browser (localStorage token past half-life); a second @getalloro.com Google account available
steps: 1. While a stale admin session (account A) sits in the browser, go to /admin and click Sign in with Google
2. Choose a different @getalloro.com account B in the Google chooser
4. Open the account menu, or run the console snapshot, to read the session identity
items.expected: The top bar and the localStorage token both resolve to account B, not A
items.notes: Cannot be automated — Google OAuth account selection. Owner/human run on dev after deploy.

items.title: Regression: normal single-account Google sign-in still works
items.precondition: Deployed to dev; cleared browser session
steps: 2. Go to /admin, click Sign in with Google, choose an @getalloro.com account
items.expected: Signs in and lands on the admin app as that account, with no error screen
